tools.name: transition_stage
tools.description: Advance current stage when exit rules and gates are satisfied.

tools.name: request_gate
tools.description: Mark a human gate as requested.

tools.name: log_decision
tools.description: Append a structured decision log entry.

tools.name: register_evidence
tools.description: Insert or update an evidence item.

tools.name: register_baseline
tools.description: Insert or update a baseline item.

tools.name: register_result
tools.description: Insert or update a result item with run provenance.

tools.name: register_artifact
tools.description: Insert or update an artifact item with provenance and run linkage.

tools.name: create_run
tools.description: Create a run directory plus canonical run_registry entry, approval metadata, retry policy, selector, worker requirements and evaluator config.

tools.name: queue_run
tools.description: Queue a run in the canonical run_registry for scheduler-driven worker leasing.
